_comment: METARA logo database. Layer 0 = universal marks used regardless of venture. Layer 1 = category families (Nonprofit, Commercial, Social Enterprise, Cooperative). Layer 2 = individual venture marks nested under a family. Update this file whenever a logo is added, renamed, or reassigned.

logos.name: Cosmic Egg (hero emblem)
logos.description: Hero emblem: core mark + Merkaba (two interlocking tetrahedra, hidden-line-removed) + orbiting Platonic solids ring (synchronized radial-axis rotation, 24 precomputed keyframes/solid) + arced METARA wordmark (live text, Cormorant Garamond).
logos.notes: Rotation frame data lives in the inline <script> at the end of index.html. No runtime geometry computation -- all keyframes precomputed.

logos.name: METARA core mark (two-square / eight-point star)
logos.location: index.html, embedded inside both .hero-logo-svg and .nav-logo-mark svg
logos.description: The universal blue/cream/orange eight-point star mark with spoke-and-circle decoration, extracted as true vector paths from logo-metara-v3.ai. Identical across all venture logo variants in the .ai file -- confirmed as the Layer 0 anchor mark.

logos.name: METARA menu/nav logo
logos.description: Standalone nav-bar version of core-metara-mark, tightly cropped, no surrounding ring geometry.

logos.name: Unconditional Love School
logos.notes: Uses core-metara-mark + pale-teal Platonic solid corner icons + arc text 'METARA' / 'UNCONDITIONAL LOVE SCHOOL'. Category layer (Nonprofit / Commercial / Social Enterprise / Cooperative) to be confirmed.

logos.name: Sacred Healing Sanctuary
logos.notes: Pill-shaped lockup, cream palette, eye + leaf motif. Category to be confirmed.

logos.name: Birthing New Humanity
logos.notes: Pink Platonic solid corner icons. Category to be confirmed.

logos.name: METARA Menu Logo (alternate arched lockup)
logos.notes: Arched/dome framing of the core mark with sunburst accents. Kept for reference; nav-metara-mark was used for the live nav bar instead.

logos.name: Holistic Lifestyle
logos.notes: Mirrored double-mark with 'EST 2021' and 'HOLISTIC LIFESTYLE' arc text, pale-gold solids. Category to be confirmed.

logos.name: METARA Galaxy Logo
logos.notes: Raster/photographic nebula style, visibly watermarked, and a different visual language (painterly glow vs. flat gold wireframe) from the rest of the site. Kept only as a mood/compositional reference for the cosmic-egg icon ring layout.
